summary: Full frontend testing of Pearl Nest page (/pearlnest) image replacement and hero text update. All 9 test scenarios passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: GallerySection.jsx line 90: hover text still strips 'Thushara Homestay ' prefix (`image.alt.replace("Thushara Homestay ", "")`) - this is a cosmetic issue; Pearl Nest alt texts don't contain that string so it has no effect, but the string is misleading
gridPositions array in GallerySection.jsx defines 8 positions but only 6 images are used - extra positions are unused but harmless
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend SPA. No backend. All 6 pearlnest images stored locally at /app/frontend/public/images/pearlnest/. PearlNestPage.jsx and PearlNestHero.jsx correctly updated. Thushara page remains unchanged.
